scope: Port the spinner-tip history, registry, and scheduler onto AgenC-owned settings/history primitives.

requiredBehaviors: recordTipShown stores the current startup/session count for the tip id
getSessionsSinceLastShown returns Infinity for tips that were never shown
history persists under AgenC config home with private directory/file permissions
edgeCases: corrupt or missing history files fall back to an empty default state
duplicate records in the same session do not rewrite the stored session count

requiredBehaviors: built-in tips are AgenC-branded and expose relevance functions
custom spinner-tip overrides can replace built-in tips
cooldown filtering uses sessions since last shown
selectTipWithLongestTimeSinceShown picks the relevant tip with the greatest session age
recordShownTip records history and emits agenc_tip_shown analytics metadata
edgeCases: optional desktop, web, mobile, marketplace, passes, and overage-credit tips are present but disabled unless context feature flags enable them
custom tips are still returned when built-ins are excluded
